releases.title: Nest entries + faster MCP
releases.summary: Nested entries, three new MCP tools, sharper coordinate accuracy on screenshot tools, and a tighter open-core posture — the in-app AI chat history layer is gone, and your CLI agent owns the conversation now.

highlights.text: **Nested entries** — drop any entry under any other entry. Stash a credential under a web session, group a document under a project, or hang an SSH command off a host. Children promote to the parent's container if you delete the parent.

**Three new MCP tools** for AI agents — `entry_list` (filter the vault by type/folder/tags), `entry_search` (substring on name + host), and `ssh_key_generate` (creates a key pair, stores it encrypted, returns just the public key + fingerprint).
**Live MCP quota counter** — Free shows usage out of 50/day, Pro and Team show unlimited, right in the [chat panel and Settings](conduit://settings/ai).

**Sharper MCP coordinate accuracy** — RDP/VNC/Web screenshots return native and image dimensions in one round-trip, so a resize between calls can't desync clicks. Web navigation finally honors `wait_until` instead of guessing with a 500 ms delay.
**macOS Spaces fix** — deep links, file opens, the picker, and toast overlays no longer drag you to whichever Space they happened to be on. They bounce the Dock instead.
**In-app AI chat history removed** — history is now owned by your CLI agent (Claude Code, Codex). The chat panel still hosts the engine; it just doesn't shadow-copy your conversation.

releases.title: Conduit is now open source
releases.summary: Apache 2.0, new pricing, bring-your-own AI agents on every tier — plus polish fixes on top of v0.14.0.

highlights.text: **Conduit is open source** — the desktop client is now Apache 2.0 and lives on GitHub at [advenimus/conduit-desktop](https://github.com/advenimus/conduit-desktop). Audit, fork, contribute, or self-host.

**Use Claude Code & Codex on any tier** — run Claude Code or Codex CLI against Conduit's MCP server with your own Anthropic or OpenAI subscription, no paid Conduit plan required. [Configure in Settings](conduit://settings/ai)
**Free tier now includes MCP** — 50 tool calls per day on the built-in MCP server (was Pro-only). Pro and Team remain unlimited.
**New pricing** — Free $0 (unlimited connections + 50 MCP calls/day), Pro $10/mo (unlimited MCP + cloud sync + 14-day local backups), Team $20/seat/mo (shared vaults + 6-month backups).
**Built-in AI chat removed** — the app now shells out to your installed Claude Code or Codex CLI. Install either one to enable the chat panel.
**Daily MCP quota enforcement** — Free hits 50/day cleanly with a clear upgrade prompt; Pro and Team are unlimited.
**What's New renders markdown** — release highlights now support **bold** and external links.
**Account tab cleanup** — removed the legacy Token Usage meter now that AI inference runs under your own Claude Code or Codex subscription.

releases.title: Conduit is now open source
releases.summary: Apache 2.0, new pricing, and bring-your-own AI agents on every tier — including Free.

highlights.text: **Conduit is open source** — the desktop client is now Apache 2.0 and lives on GitHub at [advenimus/conduit-desktop](https://github.com/advenimus/conduit-desktop). Audit, fork, contribute, or self-host.

**Use Claude Code & Codex on any tier** — run Claude Code or Codex CLI against Conduit's MCP server with your own Anthropic or OpenAI subscription, no paid Conduit plan required. [Configure in Settings](conduit://settings/ai)
**Free tier now includes MCP** — 50 tool calls per day on the built-in MCP server (was Pro-only). Pro and Team remain unlimited.
**New pricing** — Free $0 (unlimited connections + 50 MCP calls/day), Pro $10/mo (unlimited MCP + cloud sync + 14-day local backups), Team $20/seat/mo (shared vaults + 6-month backups).
**Built-in AI chat removed** — the app now shells out to your installed Claude Code or Codex CLI. Install either one to enable the chat panel.
**Daily MCP quota enforcement** — Free hits 50/day cleanly with a clear upgrade prompt; Pro and Team are unlimited.

releases.title: MCP Entry Notes Fix
releases.summary: Fixes MCP entry notes always returning null and improves vault stability.

highlights.text: Fixed MCP entry_info tool always returning null for notes even with include_notes enabled
Added SQLite busy timeout to prevent vault disk I/O errors during concurrent access

releases.title: Updater Restart Fix
releases.summary: Fixes the Restart Now button so updates actually install and relaunch.

highlights.text: Fixed "Restart Now" not quitting the app after downloading an update — close-to-tray was keeping the process alive

releases.title: Local Network Fix
releases.summary: Fixes SSH and VNC connections to devices on your local network.

highlights.text: Fixed SSH and VNC connections failing on macOS when connecting to LAN devices — macOS now properly prompts for local network access
Added network entitlements for helper processes to ensure all connection types work in production builds

releases.title: Conduit Mobile
releases.summary: Conduit is now available on iPhone and iPad — manage your connections on the go.

highlights.text: Conduit Mobile — now available for iPhone and iPad on the App Store. [Download it here](conduit://settings/mobile)
Cross-device vault sync — your vault stays in sync via Conduit Cloud Sync, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, or Dropbox
Recursive folder deletion — deleting a folder removes all contents with a count confirmation
Dashboard text is now selectable and secrets show a copy button when revealed
Fixed auto-updater restart being blocked by close-to-tray
Fixed Windows tray icon — left-click now shows the window properly

releases.title: Close to Tray & Web Downloads
releases.summary: Conduit now stays running when you close the window, and web sessions get proper download management.

highlights.text: Close to tray/dock — closing the window hides the app instead of quitting
Download management for web sessions — browser-like save prompts
Vault auto-locks and sessions close when window is hidden
Fixed SSH key authentication with generated keys
Fixed SSH private key CRLF line ending issues
SSH username now defaults to current OS user instead of root

releases.title: Copy OTP & Linked Credentials
releases.summary: Copy TOTP codes from the context menu and use credential actions with linked credentials.

highlights.text: Copy OTP — right-click credential entries with TOTP to copy the current code
Copy Username and Auto-type now resolve linked credentials automatically
Windows auto-type upgraded to native Win32 SendInput for full Unicode support

releases.title: Global Auto-Type
releases.summary: Auto-type credentials into any application on your desktop, not just Conduit sessions.

highlights.text: Global auto-type — type credentials into any focused app (browser, terminal, etc.)
OS-level keystroke simulation via AppleScript (macOS) and PowerShell SendKeys (Windows)
macOS Accessibility permission auto-prompt on first use
3-second delay for external apps gives time to switch to the target field
Fixed double-paste in Windows terminal when using Ctrl+V
